state.incident_window: NimbusAPI May 2026 major unannounced outage dispute
state.ruling_reason: The independent monitor, as the primary evidence, measured a monthly uptime of 96.8%, which is below the 99.50% commitment in clause SLA-1 and also below the 98.00% threshold in clause SLA-4. No downtime was excluded as qualified maintenance, as the maintenance feed confirms no windows were announced. Therefore, a full refund is required.
